Claim: Psi-Vortex matches/beats manual Psi-xLSTM with less expert input
Outcome: MSE 1.1e-09 vs 7.2e-07; conv 5 vs 43 ep; 0 vs 4 manual choices

Claim: BIC-inspired regularization automates structure beyond ordinary sparsity
Metric: val MSE, eff-DoF, K/r stability, manual choices
Outcome: BIC eff-DoF 1.0, K-std 0.00, vs L2 eff-DoF 1.2; fewer manual choices

Claim: Coupling is identifiable above a threshold; no coupling invented at alpha=0
Metric: recovered alpha vs GT, error, false-positive@0
Outcome: Psi-Vortex tracks y=x for alpha>=0.05; recovered alpha=0.001 at GT=0

Claim: Recovery is noise-robust; the binding constraint is sample size, not noise
Outcome: noise 0-10% changes error by <1pp at N=2000 (noise-robust); error falls 123%->31% from N=500 to 2000 then saturates

Claim: Each component contributes; full Psi-Vortex is the best trade-off
Metric: epochs, MSE, eff-DoF, alpha error, manual decisions
Outcome: init -> convergence, BIC -> structure, arch-select -> robustness, auto-sym ~ expert; full = 0 manual decisions

Claim: Exported compact model is faithful and more robust than the source network
Experiment: P6 Verilog-A vs PyTorch vs GT
Outcome: compact model (1 state, 2 contributions) tracks GT to ~31% in-distribution and beats the source NN on all stimuli incl. DC-read & 4V OOD

Claim: Psi-Vortex reports no coupling when none exists (no hallucinated state)
Baseline: alpha=0 / shuffled driver / victim-only / fake drift
Outcome: genuine alpha->0.047; alpha=0->0.001; fake drift->-0.002 (null cases stay near 0)

Claim: Generalizes across stack geometry; recovery scales with coupling strength
Metric: alpha error + fit quality across spacing/R/tau/topology
Outcome: fits all 9 geometries (val MSE<1e-7 in 100%); recovery best for strong coupling, degrades for weak (same detection regime as P3); multi-victim topologies recover like pairwise

Claim: Stable under moderate measurement artifacts; K/r structure unchanged
Metric: alpha-error degradation vs clean, K/r stability
Outcome: 7/7 artifacts add <15pp error (max +4.0pp); cluster count K perfectly stable (std=0) under all artifacts
